Bullet Point 2: 🥓 BACON JAM FOR BURGERS & MORE - Add a delicious bacon flavor to anything. Serve it with meats and cheeses on a charcuterie board. Slather it on a sandwich, burger, or even pancakes and waffles!

Made with tasty bacon pieces, each jar of our bacon jam is bursting with the delicious flavor of smokey and savory bacon, sweet apples, and caramelized onions — all cooked to perfection. Treat your tastebuds to a lip-smacking gourmet experience that’s levels above your usual bacon-infused meals and dishes!
